parameters.content:
## Trigger when executed by another workflow
This triggers when another workflow executes this workflow.

## Send Slack notification
This node sends Slack a notification when Workflow 3 or 4 are executed

## What this Workflow does
For Workflow 3 (Ticket Triage):
Receives the classified ticket data and posts a formatted Slack message with the ticket category, the submitter's name, email, and issue description. Acts as the centralised notification handler so all three routing branches (billing, technical, general) don't each need their own Slack node.

For Workflow 4 (Daily Briefing):
Receives the LLM-generated weather briefing and posts it to Slack. The same notification infrastructure used for tickets handles the briefing — the category field switches the message format between ticket and briefing style.

The point of reusing it:
One sub-workflow, two parent workflows, one place to maintain. If you change the Slack channel or message format, you update it once and both workflows get the change automatically.
